sections.title: Architecture Contract
sections.body: The UI renders read models from the gateway. Exchange-specific nuance belongs in provider adapters and service layers, not widget logic.

sections.title: CME Market Data
sections.body: CME ingress uses the native Databento C++ feed handler for MBP-1/live top-of-book and the historical executable for REST-style chart backfill.

sections.title: Workspace Payloads
sections.body: Native Cerious window payloads now live under data/window-payloads/cerious inside this Cerious project root.
